context: Tests whether swift-concurrency chooses synchronization primitives accurately and corrects stale lock guidance.

checklist.name: Actors
checklist.description: Uses actors for shared mutable state when asynchronous access and actor hops are acceptable.

checklist.name: Mutex vs OSAllocatedUnfairLock
checklist.description: Uses Mutex for new iOS 18+ code and OSAllocatedUnfairLock for iOS 16-17 support or ownership-assertion needs.

checklist.name: Atomic Scalars
checklist.description: Uses Atomic for simple scalar counters or flags when appropriate.

checklist.name: Lock Anti-Patterns
checklist.description: Rejects locks inside actors and rejects holding any lock across await suspension points.

checklist.name: NSLock Accuracy
checklist.description: Corrects the claim that NSLock is not Sendable while still preferring modern state-protecting primitives for new Swift concurrency code.
